answer:
The first statement is false because rectangles in the plane cannot shatter any set of 5 points in general position; for example, with points on a convex pentagon, no rectangle can separate a specific diagonal pair without including others. The second statement is true because with 1-NN, any set of points can be shattered by placing them arbitrarily and using the nearest neighbor rule, leading to infinite VC-dimension.  

\boxed{B}
